verdict.note: M4 defense-in-depth, LIVE on real AWS (us-east-1): a Bedrock Guardrail deployed via the M4 CDK guardrail-stack really intervened (GUARDRAIL_INTERVENED) on a tool-response containing a fake AWS access key and an sk- API token built at runtime, masking both to {aws-access-key-id}/{generic-api-token} via custom ANONYMIZED regex policies (bedrock-runtime apply_guardrail, source=OUTPUT). This is the 'every tool response passes a Guardrail' control proven end-to-end, not synth-only. The us-east-1 guardrail is a retained non-prod dev resource; guardrail id and account id scrubbed. The earlier us-west-2 guardrail was torn down.
